name: public_safety_cross_border_data_southport_car_fair
premise: A protest perimeter is tightening; legal advisers disagree on whether a new cordon meets constitutional muster under current case law. In Public Safety, the situation tagged internally around public safety cross border data southport car fair has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Two executives have pre-committed to opposite remedies in side channels; whichever memo lands first will box everyone in. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Luc Haddad
agents.identity: I am Luc Haddad, the accountable executive on this bridge in Public Safety. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mira Chandra
agents.identity: I am Mira Chandra, the field counterpart whose constituency will feel the decision first in Public Safety. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect fairness.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to fairness to secure care before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Luc Haddad must choose under care versus fairness. What does Luc Haddad do?
